name: WireGuard
description: WireGuard VPN client manager. Place .conf files on your SD card to connect.
author: aaronearles

changelog.v0.2.0: Menu UI with config picker, full/split tunnel toggle, and live status display
changelog.v0.1.9: Switch to wireguard-go (userspace); no kernel module required
changelog.v0.1.8: modprobe wireguard before ip link add; clean up stale interface on retry
changelog.v0.1.7: Switch to show2.elf for display; toggle connect/disconnect model
changelog.v0.1.6: Probe show2.elf and sdldisplay usage; read other pak launch scripts
changelog.v0.1.5: List system bin and MinUI.pak contents for display tool discovery
changelog.v0.1.4: Dump env and find minui tools for display path discovery
changelog.v0.1.3: Add set -x trace log for diagnostics
changelog.v0.1.2: Default log to SD card so it persists across reboots
changelog.v0.1.1: Fix display tool discovery for NextUI system paths
